parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM feedback_config_rules
WHERE type = 'SunAzimuth' AND active = true;

SELECT * FROM feedback_config_rules
WHERE type = 'SunAzimuth' AND active = true;

parameters.content:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Checking Rules & API Requests & Sending Appropriate FeedBack----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------




Sun API
To run it paste into CMD
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook-test/sun-data














Moon API
To run it paste into CMD
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook-test/moon-data














Heart Rate Reading
To run it paste into CMD
curl -X POST "http://localhost:5678/webhook-test/heart-rate-data" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"UserID\":1,\"SmartWatchID\":2,\"AndroidID\":3,\"heartRate\":75}"
